message:
fix(share): recurse into symlinked directories during bundle collection

Previously, symlinks pointing to directories inside the source tree were
added as flat entries rather than being traversed.  This meant their
contents were silently omitted from exports.

Now, when a symlink resolves to a contained directory it is pushed onto
the walk stack so its children are collected.  File symlinks continue to
be included directly.  The containment check and escape-rejection logic
are preserved; only the post-check handling changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
